---
title: "bic"
generated: true
description: "Per-element Bayesian information criterion $-2 ell + k  log N$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:bic -->
```python
bic(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:bic -->
Per-element Bayesian information criterion $-2\ell + k \log N$.

Here $\ell$ is the maximised log-likelihood, $k$ the number of
estimated parameters, and $N$ the number of observations.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:bic -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | A fitted `GLMResult` supplying the log-likelihood, parameter count, and observation count. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V`. `(V,)` Bayesian information criterion, one per element.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:bic -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
